arguments.task: Open official Intercom developer and pricing pages to determine: product description, API authentication methods documented by Intercom, API surface type and breadth, rate limits, whether official MCP exists, and self-serve versus gated access tier. Prefer canonical first-party pages that fully load in browser. Read the pages and return a concise structured summary with the exact supporting canonical URLs visited. Do not use search result snippets or third-party pages.

input.thought: Use the browser to inspect official Intercom documentation and pricing pages directly.

raw_result.description: AI-powered customer service platform with inbox, ticketing, help center, automation, and Fin AI support tools.
raw_result.auth_notes: Intercom documents OAuth for public apps and access tokens for private apps; tokens are sent as Bearer tokens in the Authorization header.
raw_result.gating_reason: Intercom pricing shows self-serve 14-day free trial availability on standard plans, though higher-tier sales paths also exist.

api_surface.breadth: Broad REST API covering admins, articles, companies, contacts, conversations, tickets, messages, data attributes/events, help centers, webhooks, and Fin-related resources.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official Intercom MCP server is documented, with support noted for US-hosted workspaces.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Intercom documents 10,000 API calls per minute per app for private and public apps, plus 25,000 calls per minute per workspace, with X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, and X-RateLimit-Reset headers.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official MCP is available; pricing is self-serve trial-led; developer docs clearly separate private-token and OAuth app models.

result.description: AI-powered customer service platform with inbox, ticketing, help center, automation, and Fin AI support tools.
result.auth_notes: Intercom documents OAuth for public apps and access tokens for private apps; tokens are sent as Bearer tokens in the Authorization header.
result.gating_reason: Intercom pricing shows self-serve 14-day free trial availability on standard plans, though higher-tier sales paths also exist.

api_surface.breadth: Broad REST API covering admins, articles, companies, contacts, conversations, tickets, messages, data attributes/events, help centers, webhooks, and Fin-related resources.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official Intercom MCP server is documented, with support noted for US-hosted workspaces.

result.rate_limit_notes: Intercom documents 10,000 API calls per minute per app for private and public apps, plus 25,000 calls per minute per workspace, with X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, and X-RateLimit-Reset headers.
result.notable_signals: Official MCP is available; pricing is self-serve trial-led; developer docs clearly separate private-token and OAuth app models.
